backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a cemetery record management system defining data types (GraveRecord, DeceasedPerson, GraveOwner, etc.), cemetery state, site content structures, and comparison utilities for grave records.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two implemented features: adding a sticky public navigation bar to PublicPage.tsx and removing/hiding the old PublicSectionsTiles grid component, with associated file paths and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, key changes, and notable implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, radius, chart colors, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to the cemetery management system and parish name, and mounting the app via main.tsx.
frontend/publish-live.build64.txt: Operational marker file for build 64 used solely to trigger a Live deployment via CI/CD with no functional changes.
frontend/redeploy-trigger.build63.txt: Operational trigger file for build 63 created to force a new CI build artifact and retry a failed Live deployment with no functional changes.
frontend/redeploy-trigger.build64.txt: Operational trigger file for build 64 used to produce a new CI/CD build artifact for redeployment with no functional changes.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component handling actor initialization with timeout-based error detection, identity/auth state, profile setup modal, and conditional rendering of PublicPage or AdminPanel based on authentication and authorization status.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-screen access denied component shown to authenticated but unauthorized users, displaying an error message and a logout button that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/components/ActorInitializat: Error screen displayed when the backend actor fails to initialize, offering a retry button with loading state and troubleshooting suggestions.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminGrave: Renders an interactive tile-based cemetery map grouped by alley, allowing admins to click individual grave tiles to open an edit dialog, with status-based color coding and lazy-mounted alley rows.
frontend/src/components/admin/CemeteryLa: Admin UI for managing cemetery layout, providing forms to add/remove alleys and graves with confirmation dialogs and sorted alley display.
frontend/src/components/admin/GraveEditD: A dialog component for creating and editing grave records, supporting fields for alley, plot number, status, owner, deceased persons, and payment date, with confirmation dialogs for deletion and location changes.
frontend/src/components/admin/GraveManag: Admin panel component that displays a paginated, searchable list of all grave records with debounced full-text search and a button to open the lazy-loaded GraveEditDialog for creating new graves.
frontend/src/components/admin/imageEditi: Utility functions for image processing including loading images, converting files to data URLs, and resizing images to fit within max dimensions using canvas.
frontend/src/components/admin/ImageUploa: A reusable image upload component that lets admins select, preview, resize, and save or remove an image blob, with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/admin/ManagerDel: A boss-only admin component for granting and revoking manager access by Principal ID, displaying the current boss and a list of delegated managers.
An admin component that generates and downloads a printable A4 HTML/PDF document listing all cemetery graves organized by alley, including owner, deceased persons, status, and payment date.
frontend/src/components/admin/SiteConten: Admin component for managing all site content sections (hero, parish footer, prayer, cemetery) with form state, image uploads, and save handlers using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/ConnectionStatus: Banner component that displays backend connection status (checking, disconnected) with a retry button, using the useBackendHealthCheck hook to monitor connectivity.
frontend/src/components/FloatingLoginCon: Renders a fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that triggers Internet Identity login, disabling itself while login is in progress.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays a parish footer with name, address, mass times, contact info, social links, and a bank account number copy button, fetched via a query hook.
Shows a modal dialog with detailed grave information (location, status, deceased persons) using status-based color styling for both public tile and search result data types.
frontend/src/components/GraveResultsList: Renders a paginated list of grave search results for both public and admin modes, with status badges, lazy-loaded edit dialog, and a load-more mechanism.
frontend/src/components/GraveSearch.tsx: Provides a search input with debounced in-memory full-text filtering over public or admin grave data, rendering results via GraveResultsList.
frontend/src/components/GraveTileMap.tsx: Renders a visual cemetery map organized by alleys, displaying clickable grave tiles with status-based styling, a legend, and a detail card on selection.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Displays the site header with a parish logo (custom or fallback), theme toggle button, and a logout button shown only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the homepage hero section with a background image, headline, and intro paragraph fetched from public site content, with loading skeletons and an error banner fallback.
frontend/src/components/LazyMount.tsx: A wrapper component that defers mounting its children until they are near the viewport using an IntersectionObserver hook, with a once-triggered mount strategy.
frontend/src/components/PrivatePreviewBa: Displays a top-of-page amber alert banner indicating the app is running in Private Preview Mode for internal testing only.
frontend/src/components/PrivatePreviewGa: Blocks access to public content when Private Preview Mode is active and the user is unauthenticated, showing an Internet Identity login prompt instead.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to create a profile, submitting via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/PublicNavigation: A sticky top navigation bar with four section tabs (map, search, prayer, about) that highlights the active section and supports responsive label truncation.
frontend/src/components/SiteContentLoadE: A reusable amber alert banner component that displays a configurable error message when site content fails to load.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuthorization: Hook that queries the backend for the current user's access role and returns authorization state indicating whether the user is a boss, manager, or unauthorized.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendHealthCheck: Hook that periodically calls the backend healthCheck endpoint and exposes connection status (checking/connected/disconnected) with a manual recheck function.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Generic hook that debounces a value by delaying state updates until after a specified delay (default 300ms).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInView.ts: Hook using IntersectionObserver to detect when a DOM element enters the viewport, with optional triggerOnce support to prevent re-triggering on re-renders.
frontend/src/hooks/usePrivatePreviewMode: Hook that manages a private preview mode flag, enabling or disabling it via URL hash parameters and persisting the state in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central collection of React Query hooks for all backend data fetching and mutations, covering graves, cemetery state, site content, user profiles, and image updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including color tokens for backgrounds, tiles, sidebar, and charts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page with tabbed navigation for managing graves, cemetery map/layout, search, PDF export, site content, and (for boss-level users) manager delegation, using lazy-loaded components.
frontend/src/pages/PublicPage.tsx: Public-facing page that renders a hero section and navigation bar with switchable sections for grave search, tile map, prayer content, and cemetery information fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/alleySort.ts: Provides a natural-sort comparator and a sortAlleys helper that sorts AlleyView arrays by name with correct numeric ordering (e.g., '2' before '10').
frontend/src/utils/authErrors.ts: Utility functions that inspect error messages to classify backend errors as boss-lock, manager authorization, general authorization, connectivity, or access-control initialization failures.
frontend/src/utils/graveFullTextSearch.t: In-memory full-text search utilities for grave records in both admin and public modes, building normalized search indexes and filtering results with optional early-exit on maxResults.
frontend/src/utils/graveStatusStyles.ts: Shared styling utilities that map GraveStatus enum values to Tailwind CSS classes for backgrounds, hover rings, badge variants, legend colors, and Polish status labels.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a Cemetery Map app, tracking existing features (sticky top nav bar replacing tile navigation) and a pending aesthetic improvement request for that nav bar.
